content.query:
CREATE DATABASE DataExplorationDB 
                COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2_UTF8
        
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE datalake_ds
WITH ( LOCATION = 'https://sireeshastoragegroup.dfs.core.windows.net')

CREATE LOGIN Sireesha 
WITH PASSWORD = 'Gandlapathi@7093185600';

CREATE USER Sireesha FOR LOGIN Sireesha;
GO
GRANT ADMINISTER DATABASE BULK OPERATIONS TO Sireesha;
GO

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
            BULK '/synapsedatalake/NYCTripSmall.parquet',
            DATA_SOURCE = 'datalake_ds',
            FORMAT='PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
